overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked, neon-lit urban street at dusk. The environment features towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and a hazy atmosphere with heavy use of purple, blue, and pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic billboards

events.description: large delivery truck passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk behind an NPC, observing the neon-lit street environment

notable_agents.action: shirtless male NPC walking ahead of ego on the sidewalk
large dark delivery truck driving past on the multi-lane street

entered.detail: massive holographic billboard displaying AVANTE advertisement with figures on it
concrete dividers separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the street
tall building covered in glowing neon signs and digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street with the camera following a character walking behind an NPC. A massive AVANTE billboard dominates the right side while concrete barriers line the left. The wet pavement reflects the purple and pink neon lights from the surrounding buildings as a large truck passes by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area approaching overpass with street crossing

events.description: moving from open street into the shadow of the massive overpass structure ahead
crossing the multi-lane street while cars pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wet street toward the overpass, avoiding vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: sedan with headlights on driving through the intersection
pedestrian holding an umbrella waiting at the street corner

entered.detail: massive curved concrete overpass spanning across the street ahead
ground floor commercial spaces with glowing signage at street level

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open street toward a massive overpass structure that spans the road ahead. The ambient lighting dims as the camera enters the shadow of the overpass while crossing the multi-lane street. Street-level shops with neon signage become visible on the right as vehicles pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive overpass with neon storefronts

events.description: entering deep shadow under the overpass, ambient light drops significantly
passing the bright red neon signage of the Burrito XXL shop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass past various storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking toward the camera direction

entered.detail: fast food storefront with bright red neon BURRITO XXL signage and menu displays
automated food vending machines with glowing product displays

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered walkway beneath the massive overpass structure, where natural light is completely blocked. The environment is darker with artificial neon providing most illumination. The character passes a distinctive Burrito XXL shop with bright red neon signage and automated vending machines while encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with crosswalk and multiple digital billboards

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area back into the open street with visible sky
waiting at the crosswalk for the traffic signal to change

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk intersection for the signal to change, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall structure with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a more open intersection area where the sky is visible again. The camera approaches a crosswalk with striped markings and waits for the traffic signal. A tall digital billboard tower stands on the left while groups of pedestrians gather at the corner waiting to cross the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with neon-lit buildings on all sides

events.description: beginning to cross the wide intersection alongside a crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians, moving toward the opposite corner with neon buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella crossing the street in the rain
pedestrian in dark clothing walking briskly across the crosswalk

entered.detail: building corner with bright pink and blue neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character actively crossing the wide intersection crosswalk with a crowd of other pedestrians. A notable pedestrian with a red umbrella crosses nearby. The camera moves toward a corner building covered in bright pink and blue neon signage, with the wet street surface reflecting the vibrant lights of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, transitioning from an open neon-lit street into the shadows of a massive overpass before emerging into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by following a character past a towering AVANTE billboard and concrete barriers, where the wet pavement reflects vibrant purple and pink hues as a large truck passes. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into the dimming light beneath a sprawling overpass, passing street-level shops and a bright red Burrito XXL storefront amidst a crowd of pedestrians. The camera then emerges from the covered walkway back into the open air, approaching a striped crosswalk beneath a tall digital billboard tower. Finally, the movement concludes as the character crosses the wide intersection with a crowd, passing a pedestrian with a red umbrella toward a building draped in brilliant pink and blue neon.
